narrative:
Silvercreek 426 (precinct in Greene County) has 745 registered voters, with 44.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.4 percentage points.
